## AuthHookInput interface

Structured authentication data passed to an auth hook.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface AuthHookInput
```

## Remarks

Browser clients usually cannot set arbitrary WebSocket upgrade headers, so `pi-ws` can run auth from a reserved first websocket message as well as from upgrade request metadata.
